hero.description: Vegan and organic recipes, eco-friendly restaurants, ethical marketplace and an AI assistant with voice commands — all in one platform for a greener future.

features.subtitle: A cutting-edge digital platform that integrates technology, sustainability and well-being.

items.recipes_desc: Thousands of recipes filterable by diet, ingredients, prep time and nutrition, with suggestions for local ingredients.
items.map_desc: Advanced geolocation to find eco-friendly restaurants and shops with filters for price, rating and distance.
items.market_desc: A showcase for trading eco products and reuse, with strict guidelines to ensure sustainability.
items.ai_desc: GPT-based chatbot that guides you with personalized suggestions, meal plans and waste-reduction tips.
items.voice_desc: Voice recognition for hands-free interactions — ask for recipes, timers and conversions while you cook.
items.blog_desc: Articles, guides and a network of people committed to responsible choices. Notifications, social and live bookings.

how.subtitle: We democratize a healthy and sustainable lifestyle, leveraging technology to reduce environmental impact.
how.step1_desc: Explore vegan and organic recipes, eco restaurants and sustainable products with advanced filters and geolocation.
how.step2_desc: Follow AI-guided recipes with voice commands, book tables live at the best green spots near you.
how.step3_desc: Track CO₂ saved, join the reuse marketplace and build a greener future.

cta.subtitle_2: Join over 10,000 people already living more sustainably with Vireo.

footer.description: Smart Living, Green Future. The digital platform that integrates technology, sustainability and well-being.

recipes.title: Vegan & Organic Recipes
recipes.subtitle: Discover plant-based recipes curated for every occasion
